info.title: Delivery Api Service
info.description:
This API exposes endpoints.

## Authentication

All API endpoints require a **Bearer JWT token** in the `Authorization` header.

Tokens are issued by the **Auth Service** via OAuth2 client credentials flow.

### Obtain a token

```
POST {auth-service-url}/oauth/token
Authorization: Basic Base64(apiKey:apiSecret)
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=client_credentials
```

Credentials must be provided via **HTTP Basic Authentication** (Base64-encoded `apiKey:apiSecret`).

### Use the token

```
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
```

> Contact your administrator to obtain API credentials (apiKey / apiSecret).

post.description: Accepts a batch of pickup locations for create or update. Matching is by `code` — existing codes are updated, new codes are created. Processing is asynchronous via message queue. On completion, a webhook event `pickup_location_bulk_upsert_completed` is sent with results and any errors.

parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

post.description: Dispatches a new delivery order to the best available carrier provider. An optional idempotency key prevents duplicate orders.

exponentBase.description: Base for the exponential delay calculation (delay = base^attempt seconds)

UpdateWebhookRequest.description: Request to update an existing webhook subscription. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

callbackUrl.description: HTTPS URL that will receive webhook events

clientSecret.description: HMAC secret for verifying webhook signatures (only returned on creation)

closed.description: Whether the location is closed on this day

intervals.description: Time intervals when the location is open

OpeningHoursDTO.description: Opening hours configuration with support for multiple intervals per day

schedule.description: Schedule per day of week. Keys: monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday, sunday

TimeIntervalDTO.description: A time interval within a day

UpdatePickupLocationRequest.description: Request to update an existing pickup location. All fields are optional for partial update.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default pickup location

CreateWebhookRequest.description: Request to create or update a webhook subscription

callbackUrl.description: HTTPS URL that will receive webhook events

webhookSecret.description: Optional webhook secret. If not provided, one will be auto-generated.

TestWebhookRequest.description: Optional request body for sending a test webhook event

testField.description: Custom payload for the test event; if omitted, a default value is used

CreatePickupLocationRequest.description: Request to create a new pickup location

code.description: Unique code for the location (per user)

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default pickup location

deliveryTypeConfig.description: Per-delivery-type configuration. Keys are delivery type names (e.g. STORE_NEXT_DAY), values are key-value maps.

Filter.description: Individual filter criteria for a specific field

Pagination.description: Pagination parameters for controlling result set size and page selection

itemsPerPage.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 50 if not specified.

pageNumber.description: Page number (1-based indexing). Defaults to 1 if not specified.

SearchPickupLocationsRequest.description:
Advanced search request for pickup locations with filtering, sorting, and pagination capabilities.
**Query Fields** (full-text search): `name`, `code`, `city`, `contactName`
**Available Filter/Sort Fields:**
- `code` (String, sortable)
- `status` (PickupLocationStatus, sortable)
- `type` (PickupLocationType, sortable)
- `city` (String, sortable)
- `countryCode` (String, sortable)
- `isDefault` (Boolean, sortable)
- `createdDate` (Instant, sortable)

query.description: Full-text search query string. Matches against predefined query fields using case-insensitive LIKE.

filters.description: Filter groups with AND/OR logic. Each group contains a list of filter criteria that are combined using the specified operator.

sort.description: Sort criteria applied in order. Only sortable fields are accepted.

fieldName.description: Field name to sort by. Must be a sortable field.

BulkUpsertPickupLocationRequest.description: Request to bulk upsert pickup locations. Each item is matched by `code` — existing codes are updated, new codes are created.

items.description: List of pickup locations to create or update

fullAddress.description: Full formatted address string. Auto-generated from individual fields if not provided.

intercom.description: Intercom or buzzer code for building entry

AddressPlaceDTO.description: Third-party address place reference (e.g. Google Places)

HandshakeDeliveryDTO.description: PIN handshake configuration for a delivery

isRequired.description: Enable PIN verification feature on the delivery.

sendSmsToDropoffContact.description: When enabled, DHS will send a pre-defined SMS to recipient including the delivery PIN code. Disable only if PIN is communicated some other way.

HubContactDTO.description: Contact and location details for a pickup or dropoff point

notes.description: Notes or instructions for the driver

pickupReferenceNumber.description: Pickup reference number used by the driver to collect the package (e.g., invoice number, order reference, or warehouse release code)

HubCreateDeliveryRequest.description: Request to create a new delivery order. A quoteId from a prior quote request is required; pickup and dropoff must match the quoted addresses.

quoteId.description: Quote ID from a prior quote request

pickup.description: Pickup contact and location. Optional when pickupLocationCode is provided.

scheduledAt.description: Scheduled pickup time (null for immediate dispatch)

smsNotifications.description:
Content for the SMS message(s) which will be sent to the recipient at certain stages of the delivery.

This is an optional feature for communicating the tracking link to the recipient.

handshake.description: Handshake details for secure delivery. Enables PIN verification on delivery.

recipient.description: Details of the recipient who is going to receive the delivery

providerData.description: Provider-specific account data. Required for STORE_NEXT_DAY delivery type.

pickupLocationCode.description: Optional pickup location code. When set, pickup contact and address are auto-filled from the location.

HubItemDTO.description: An item included in the delivery

sku.description: Optional SKU or identifier for the item

ProviderDataDTO.description: Provider-specific account data. Required for STORE_NEXT_DAY delivery type.

RecipientDeliveryDTO.description: Details of the recipient who is going to receive the delivery

name.description: Required. Name of delivery recipient. Must be non-empty string.

phoneNumber.description: Required. Phone number for the contact with country code and leading plus symbol.

HubCreateDeliveryResponse.description: Response after successfully creating a delivery

trackingUrl.description: Public tracking URL for the delivery

SearchDeliveriesRequest.description:
Advanced search request for deliveries with filtering, sorting, and pagination capabilities.
**Query Fields** (full-text search): `providerTrackingId`, `externalOrderId`
**Available Filter/Sort Fields:**
- `status` (HubDeliveryStatus, sortable) - CREATED, ASSIGNED, PICKED_UP, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, CANCELLED, FAILED
- `deliveryType` (DeliveryType, sortable)
- `providerType` (DeliveryProviderType, sortable)
- `createdDate` (Instant, sortable)
- `userId` (Long, sortable) - Auto-filtered for non-admin users

query.description: Full-text search query string. Matches against predefined query fields using case-insensitive LIKE.

filters.description: Filter groups with AND/OR logic. Each group contains a list of filter criteria that are combined using the specified operator.

sort.description: Sort criteria applied in order. Only sortable fields are accepted.

HubDeliveryQuoteRequest.description: Request to get a delivery price quote

pickup.description: Pickup contact and location. Optional when pickupLocationCode is provided.

items.description: List of items for weight/size estimation

pickupLocationCode.description: Optional pickup location code. When set, pickup contact and address are auto-filled from the location.

HubDeliveryQuoteResponse.description: Delivery price quote from a carrier provider

estimatedArrivalSeconds.description: Estimated time of arrival in seconds

quoteId.description: Internal quote identifier for use when creating a delivery

distanceMeters.description: Distance between pickup and dropoff in meters

expiresAt.description: Quote expiration time — create delivery before this time

EchoResponse.description: Echo response containing the echoed message and API version

HubDeliveryLabelResponse.description: Label metadata and asset URLs for a delivery

qrCode.description: URL to the QR code image (PNG)

HubDeliveryStatusResponse.description: Full delivery status including tracking and history

providerTrackingId.description: Tracking ID from the carrier provider

trackingUrl.description: Public tracking URL for the delivery recipient

proofOfDeliveryUrl.description: URL to the proof-of-delivery image (available after delivery)

pickupReferenceNumber.description: Pickup reference number used by the driver to collect the package (e.g., invoice number, warehouse release code)

HubStatusEventDTO.description: A single status change event in the delivery lifecycle

proofOfDeliveryUrl.description: URL to proof-of-delivery image (only for DELIVERED status)

HubHandshakeDeliveryResponse.description: Handshake PIN information for a delivery

required.description: Whether a PIN handshake is required for this delivery
